subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: The word 'Devil' or Satan is used in St. John 8 - 'Ye are of your father the devil.' This means that the Pharisees were not the true children of Abraham
subcodes.subjects: @Satan; the Evil One, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
